name: Georgia Peach Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 peaches, peeled and cut into 1-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
Prepare the Crust:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour and salt.
2. Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Sprinkle 5 to 6 tablespoons cold water, 1 tablespoon at a time, over flour mixture; toss with fork to blend lightly but evenly.
4. When the mixture forms a ball, gently knead 2 or 3 times.
5. Divide dough into two portions.
6. On a lightly floured surface, roll out half of the dough to form a 12-inch circle; transfer to a 9-inch pie plate and trim, leaving a 1-inch overhang.
7. Roll out the remaining dough on a lightly floured surface to form a 12-inch circle; cut into ten strips, each about 1-inch wide. Set aside.
Prepare the Filling:
8. In a large bowl, combine peaches, sugar, flour, lemon juice, and grated lemon peel; toss well.
9. Pour the filling into the prepared crust.
10. Arrange the reserved dough strips in a lattice pattern over the filling.
11. Trim the strips to match the lower edge of the crust's overhang.
12. Dampen the overhang lightly with water.
13. Fold up and seal the edges of the dough.
14. Decoratively flute the edge.
15. Brush the lattice strips and edge of the crust with milk.
16. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes, or until bubbling and golden brown.
